metadata.name: Check Parts Availability for a Recall

description: A customer who needs a recall service performed wants to ensure the dealership has the necessary parts before they bring their car in.

nodes.task_description: Identify the specific recall the customer is referring to.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the recall for the airbag inflator.

nodes.task_description: Get the part number for the recall kit.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the part number for the recall remedy kit.

nodes.task_description: Check the dealership's parts inventory for the recall kit.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the part is in stock at the dealership.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer that the part is in stock and proceed with scheduling their appointment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reassures the customer and books the appointment.
